runs.note: Fixed SQL injection vulnerabilities by replacing db.unsafeQuery() with parameterized db.query() calls, added ORDER BY allowlist validation to prevent injection, and implemented HTML encoding in renderPost() to prevent XSS attacks

runs.note: Fixed SQL injection by converting all query functions from db.unsafeQuery() to parameterized db.query() calls. Added ORDER BY validation against allowlist in listPosts(). Implemented HTML entity encoding in renderPost() to prevent XSS attacks on title and body fields.
